blockers.description: Real per-tier prices ($297 Virtual / $497 Executive / $2,497 VIP are placeholders; Virtual $297 collides with the $297 RESS), checkout/order URL, specialist/booking URL, guarantee terms — all TBD from Alex
Page 2 payment is design-only: real charges need GHL's native One-Step Order form mounted (marked 'GHL ORDER FORM MOUNT') or PASTE_ORDER_URL set
Arena seat-map art on Page 2 is a placeholder SVG ('Map art TBD') — Cherlon supplying final art; keep data-tier attributes so click-to-select still works
Virtual tier semantics (physical back section vs remote stream-only) still to reconcile — affects map + copy

decisions.decision: Page 3 confirmation hero = winner C (tactile ticket-stub) over A (centered) / B (split)
decisions.rationale: Cherlon chose it 2026-06-26 — most tangible 'here's your ticket' reward; A/B preserved in sketch 008
gcre- vertical prefix, collision-safe in GHL; no <body> styling

decisions.decision: Page 3 in-person vs virtual is driven by ?tier= URL param (checkout CTA appends it), not a manual toggle
Bodoni accent pinned to opsz 18 with font-optical-sizing:none
decisions.rationale: auto optical sizing picked the high-contrast display cut at large sizes -> spindly hairlines; pinning to the text cut restores legibility while keeping elegance

decisions.decision: Ticket art + GC logo + Grant portrait use real GHL media-library URLs (assets.cdn.filesafe.space/FIWJhGH5AzdaZCNMxvft/...)
decisions.rationale: uploaded assets work instantly in GHL; same art across all 3 pages

Next real work is GO-LIVE WIRING (task 8) — fill PASTE_CHECKOUT_URL / order form / specialist URL / merge tags once Alex supplies real values. Optional polish: tasks 9-11. context_notes: Repo = GHL paste-ready inline code blocks only (no standalone sites). Verify designs in Chrome via chrome-devtools MCP (if profile locks: pkill -f 'chrome-devtools-mcp/chrome-profile'). Sketches use remote GHL CDN image URLs (work locally + in GHL). gsd commit helper: node $HOME/.claude/gsd-core/bin/gsd-tools.cjs query commit '<msg>' --files <paths>. GitHub remote: alexv-grantcardone/10x-real_estate; push had one transient 'Connection reset' — just retry. Author for Supabase remember() = read repo-root .author file.
